title: pelargonium × forsterianum
intro: Pelargonium × forsterianum, also known as the Cape Rose or Red Tip Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, and has been used to treat a variety of health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × forsterianum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tea, tincture, and oil forms, which can be used to make remedies for various health issues.
